title: helianthemum × serranicum
intro: Helianthemum × serranicum, also known as rockrose, is a hybrid plant species within the Helianthemum genus, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been used to treat various health issues. Rockrose has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of rockrose include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, often used to treat skin conditions, digestive issues, and other health problems.
